title: Power-outage refrigerator decision clock
summary: Write the time power failed, keep doors closed, group verified cold items, and prepare a discard decision using official food-safety guidance.
content: Write the time power failed, keep doors closed, group verified cold items, and prepare a discard decision using official food-safety guidance. When temperature or outage history is uncertain, choose the safer discard option for perishable food. Never taste food to test whether it stayed safe.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Power-outage refrigerator decision clock”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Power-outage refrigerator decision clock»
steps: Write the time power failed, keep doors closed, group verified cold items, and prepare a discard decision using official food-safety guidance.
When temperature or outage history is uncertain, choose the safer discard option for perishable food.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
warnings: Never taste food to test whether it stayed safe.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Power-outage refrigerator decision clock.
short_term: For Power-outage refrigerator decision clock, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Power-outage refrigerator decision clock, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Power-outage refrigerator decision clock, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Power-outage refrigerator decision clock to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
sources: CDC — Water, sanitation and hygiene emergencies: https://www.cdc.gov/water-emergency/index.html
